name: linear-mcp
description: Linear project management MCP server — issue-based exfiltration; attacker plants malicious content in issues that triggers data leakage when agent reads them (arXiv:2509.06572)
version_note: Version 0.3.0 is the estimated npm stable release closest to the paper submission date (September 2025).
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2509.06572 is not disclosed; 0.3.0 is the best estimate based on npm publish history around that date.
